name: Banana Blueberry Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
2. Set aside.
3. Cream the butter until light and fluffy.
4. Gradually beat in the sugar.
5. Beat in the eggs one at a time.
6. Add the flour mixture and mashed bananas alternately into the butter mixture in three parts.
7. Gently stir in the blueberries.
8. Turn the batter into an oiled 9 x 5-inch loaf pan.
9. Bake at 350 degrees for 50 minutes.
10. Turn out of the pan to cool.
